18.kj: [idiom] armed, buckler, defence, ruler, [phrase] scale, shield.
18.dv: also (in plural) feminine מְגִנָּה; from H1598 (גָּנַן);

18.gl: to have affection for (sexually or otherwise)

19.gl: wind; by resemblance breath, i.e. a sensible (or even violent) exhalation; figuratively, life, anger, unsubstantiality; by extension, a region of the sky; by resemblance spirit, but only of a rational being (including it
19.kj: air, anger, blast, breath, [idiom] cool, courage, mind, [idiom] quarter, [idiom] side, spirit(-ual), tempest, [idiom] vain, (whirl-) wind(-y).

19.gl: an edge or extremity; specifically (of a bird or army) a wing, (of a garment or bedclothing) a flap, (of the earth) a quarter, (of a building) a pinnacle
19.kj: [phrase] bird, border, corner, end, feather(-ed), [idiom] flying, [phrase] (one an-) other, overspreading, [idiom] quarters, skirt, [idiom] sort, uttermost part, wing(-ed).

19.gl: properly, to pale, i.e. by implication to be ashamed; also (by implication) to be disappointed or delayed
19.kj: (be, make, bring to, cause, put to, with, a-) shamed(-d), be (put to) confounded(-fusion), become dry, delay, be long.

19.gl: to cramp, literally or figuratively, transitive or intransitive
19.kj: adversary, (be in) afflict(-ion), beseige, bind (up), (be in, bring) distress, enemy, narrower, oppress, pangs, shut up, be in a strait (trouble), vex.

19.gl: properly, a slaughter, i.e. the flesh of an animal; by implication, a sacrifice (the victim or the act)
